_comment: Authored by Claude. News daemon polls these queries every cadence. Emits news_flash events ONLY when a headline contains ≥1 required keyword AND the URL hasn't been seen before AND the query's cooldown has elapsed. Claude updates this as thesis shifts.

queries.query: Iran US ceasefire deal Islamabad talks
queries.note: TUNED 2026-04-22 11:38 UTC — fixed-deadline binary REMOVED (4-source verification of Trump indefinite extension: Reuters/NYT/Detroit News/AJ). Dropped 'expire'/'expiry' (deadline p | 2026-04-22 23:55 UTC TUNE: DROPPED "announce"+"Islamabad" (caught Apr 12 WaPo Islamabad-talks-collapse republish via announce+Islamabad match). ADDED "walks out","Iran walkout","Vance trip" phrases. Keyword set now escalation-specific. | 2026-04-23T04:03:00Z TUNE: Apr 12 Times of India Islamabad-talks-collapse republish fired via 'collapse' solo-kw 11d stale. ADDED match_keywords date filter ['April 2026','Apr 22','Apr 23','Apr 20','Apr 21'] per hormuz/opec/boj/fed_fomc pattern. Kept 'collapse' as primary — legit escalation kw, date filter handles staleness. RE-TUNED 2026-04-23T04:35:00Z — substring-leak bug: 'Apr 20' was matching 'Apr 2026' as substring (any 2026 article passed). Switched to 'DD Mon YYYY' tokens which align with RSS pubDate format and have unique day numbers.

RE-TUNED 2026-04-23T03:25:00Z — prior filter [2026,April,Apr 22,Apr 23] too broad — Apr 7 2026 CBS archive 'Iran war throttle oil flows even if Hormuz reopens' matched via 'April' (any-month-2026) + 'reopen' kw. Tightened to current-window dates only. Bump window +1d on each tick; year-only/month-only filters are banned. RE-TUNED 2026-04-23T04:35:00Z — substring-leak bug: 'Apr 20' was matching 'Apr 2026' as substring (any 2026 article passed). Switched to 'DD Mon YYYY' tokens which align with RSS pubDate format and have unique day numbers.

queries.query: US Iran naval Hormuz blockade retaliation
queries.note: RE-TUNED 2026-04-22 18:55 UTC — prior 'retaliation'/'retaliate'/'struck'/'escalation'/'mine' flooded 12 stale archive articles this tick: 10 Apr 13-14 original blockade-announcement (Algemeiner/Fox/Globe & Mail/MSN/etc.) + 1 Apr 16 CNBC 'fourth day' + 1 Apr 19 Il Sole Touska republish. Those keywords match 9-day-old routine coverage of baseline state. REMOVED broad keywords; kept only action-verbs describing NEW escalation rungs (missile launched, casualties, sunk, ablaze) + forward diplomatic names (Vance/Witkoff/Kushner/Islamabad) + de-escalation-trigger phrases (Hormuz reopen, blockade lifted, new talks, walkout). Cooldown 60→120min. If this still floods: add date-filter logic to daemon.

RE-TUNED 2026-04-23T01:08:00Z — prior 00:41 UTC fire matched Feb 13 2026 Reuters archive (70-day-old) on 'war' keyword. Root cause: 'war'/'Iran' in keywords_required matched any Hormuz-tangential archive regardless of supply content; '2026'/'April' in match_keywords matched published-date string on archives. REMOVED broad geopolitical kw ('war','Iran') and loose date-year kw ('2026','April'). REPLACED with explicit supply-shock action verbs ('surprise cut','OPEC+ cut','output hike','production halt','Saudi raises/cuts','Hormuz closure/shut/reopen') and strict forward-month kw ('May 2026','June 2026','July 2026','this week','next week','announced today','announced yesterday'). Cooldown 120→240min (supply news is slow-drip, don't need sub-2h repeats). Prior note: 'RE-TUNED 2026-04-22T22:18:17Z — prior broad keywords ['increase','announce','hike','meeting'] matched 4 stale archives this tick (Aug 2025 NYT, Sep 2025 NYT, Mar 2026 Reuters x2). Narrowed to action-verbs + forward-looking supply-shock triggers tied to current Hormuz situation. Added match_keywords=['2026','April','May 2026','June 2026'] date filter (fed_fomc/boj pattern). Cooldown 60→120min.'

queries.query: Bank of Japan yen intervention MoF Katayama
queries.note: RE-TUNED 2026-04-23T01:05Z — Mar 13 2026 Dailyhunt Katayama-Iran-fallout 41-day archive fired on 'Katayama' solo-req kw (match_keywords ['2026','April','Apr 27','Apr 28','policy meeting'] NOT enforced by watcher per empirical evidence: prior tune 22:01 still allowed 01:02 fire). Removed bare 'Katayama'/'Akazawa'/'hike'/'decision' solo-req tokens (MoF names appear in backgrounder archives, 'hike'/'decision' too generic). Replaced with action-phrase required: 'intervene','sold yen','bought yen','rate check','urgency','excessive','surprise hike','stealth intervention','yen intervention','pain threshold','verbal intervention','sold dollars','smoothing operation'. Cooldown 180→240min. match_keywords kept for when watcher enforces them later. Re-evaluate after BoJ Apr 27-28. RE-TUNED 2026-04-23T04:35:00Z — substring-leak bug: 'Apr 20' was matching 'Apr 2026' as substring (any 2026 article passed). Switched to 'DD Mon YYYY' tokens which align with RSS pubDate format and have unique day numbers. (boj_intervention: dropped bare '2026'/'April'; kept date-precise + action phrases)

TUNED 2026-04-22T21:27:27Z — added match_keywords=['2026'] to block Oct 2025 Powell archive republish (stale '2025' article fired this tick despite prior narrowing of query text). Strict 2026 filter will force current-FOMC-era matches only. Re-evaluate after Apr 28-29 meeting passes. | 2026-04-23T00:23Z RE-TUNE: prior match_keywords=['2026'] ineffective (substring '2026' present in query-string and many article URLs; 6 stale Powell archives fired this tick — Oct 2025/Jan 2026x2/Feb 2026/Apr 6/Apr 14). Replaced with narrower match_keywords that require a current-decision-cycle phrase (Apr 29 meeting specifics). Raised cooldown 180→360min.

RE-TUNED 2026-04-23T03:33:00Z — prior keywords ['Bullock','May meeting','surprise','unexpected'] still matched Jul 23 2025 Guardian Bullock-wary-of-cutting archive (9 months stale) via solo 'Bullock' governor-name token. 'Bullock' appears in any RBA-related archive backgrounder regardless of current relevance (same failure mode as 'Katayama'/'Islamabad' in earlier tunes). STRIPPED bare 'Bullock' + single-word 'surprise'/'unexpected'; REPLACED with action-phrase required ('surprise cut','surprise hike','cash rate raised','voted to hike','emergency','unscheduled','hold rates'). Added match_keywords date filter following boj_intervention/opec_supply pattern. Cooldown 240min kept. Prior: 'RE-TUNED 2026-04-21 07:38 UTC — narrowed to action/person specific. Market pricing May hike to 4.35%; risk-off may force RBA pause — AUD bid thesis broken under blockade.'

RE-TUNED 2026-04-23T08:08:00Z — DROPPED 'reset' solo-kw. Chatham House Feb 17 2026 'Despite reset in India–US relations, New Delhi retains commitment to strategic hedging' (65-day archive) fired on 'reset' solo-match; match_keywords=['20 Apr 2026'...'23 Apr 2026'] date filter STILL-NOT-ENFORCED by daemon (known bug forex_news_watcher.py:246 match_keywords NEVER-ENFORCED). 'reset' is pure commentary noun — any India-US relationship article ever written matches. Kept action-specific tokens (exemption/delay/signed/retaliate/lowered/raised/executive order); even these will leak past match_keywords but are less prone to pure-backgrounder false positives. Prior: 'RE-TUNED 2026-04-23T00:03:00Z DROPPED Modi solo-kw Feb 2 80d archive. | RE-RE-TUNED 04:03 removed bare 2026. RE-TUNED 04:35 DD Mon YYYY tokens.'
